title: salix obtusa
intro: Salix obtusa, also known as the Chinese willow or white willow, is a species of willow tree native to China and other parts of East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with its bark containing salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, which gives it medicinal properties. The health benefits of Salix obtusa include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating fever, rheumatism, and other conditions. Salix obtusa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to alleviate pain and discomfort.
